proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +34.3pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
Portfolio is 100% Choppy with UP_TRI at 28/33 positions; if regime flips to Bear, simultaneous activation of this boost could rapidly compound UP_TRI exposure — monitor for regime transition
R-multiple 0.61 reflects Day-6 forced-exit dominance (project_anchor §7 D-8); cap at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL remains appropriate
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +34.3pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +34.3pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (stable, 7 days) with 100% Choppy exposure across 33 open positions, so activation is deferred and existing concentration is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-05-20) with no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: UP_TRI × Metal: n=17, 88.2% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, sector=Metal (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +27.9pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.6566 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.72 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
Portfolio is 100% Choppy-concentrated with UP_TRI dominating (28 of 33 open); any Metal-sector promotion that activates in current regime will further concentrate an already-flagged exposure axis
n=17 sample is unchanged across many days — if these trades cluster on a narrow date window the Wilson bound may overstate replicability (Step 4 cannot detect this)
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=17, wr=88.2%, edge +27.9pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=17, Wilson lower 0.6566 above Tier M floor, +27.9pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.72. The sector=Metal filter narrows rather than amplifies UP_TRI exposure (28 of 33 open) in a 100% Choppy-concentrated portfolio, and TAKE_SMALL sizing limits incremental concentration. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-05-20) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime = Choppy (100.0%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime = Choppy; recommended action: Pause new entries in regime=Choppy and in sector=Bank/Metal until either (a) regime diversifies via natural Day-6 exits or (b) Choppy×UP_TRI cohort upgrades to Tier M. Consider an index hedge (e.g., short NIFTY futures or long ATM put) sized to ~25-30% of book delta to protect against a Choppy→Bear flip that would unwind the long-dominated book.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip unwinds the entire 33-position long book (28 UP_TRI + 5 BULL_PROXY) simultaneously, with Bank (7 positions) and Metal (9 positions) — 48% of the book — exposed to cyclical/financial drawdowns first. No statistical edge support means losses cannot be justified ex-post as expected variance around a known edge.

evidence: regime_concentration.triggered=true with observed=1.0 (100% Choppy, above 0.80 threshold)
Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort is only Candidate tier (n=118) — unvalidated edge
UP_TRI signal share at 28/33 = 84.8%, just below the 0.85 single-signal threshold
Two near-threshold cells: UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank at 18.18% and UP_TRI×Choppy×Metal at 18.18%
All concentration cells map to Candidate-tier cohort only (n=118)
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in regime=Choppy and in sector=Bank/Metal until either (a) regime diversifies via natural Day-6 exits or (b) Choppy×UP_TRI cohort upgrades to Tier M. Consider an index hedge (e.g., short NIFTY futures or long ATM put) sized to ~25-30% of book delta to protect against a Choppy→Bear flip that would unwind the long-dominated book.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip unwinds the entire 33-position long book (28 UP_TRI + 5 BULL_PROXY) simultaneously, with Bank (7 positions) and Metal (9 positions) — 48% of the book — exposed to cyclical/financial drawdowns first. No statistical edge support means losses cannot be justified ex-post as expected variance around a known edge.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Portfolio is 100% Choppy regime (observed 1.0, above the 0.80 threshold) and the matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=118) — unvalidated edge. Additionally, UP_TRI dominates signal mix at 28/33 = 84.8% (just under 85%) and two cells breach the 20% threshold: UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank at 18.18% and UP_TRI×Choppy×Metal at 18.18% — both close to but below the cell threshold. The regime concentration combined with unvalidated cohort support warrants warn — a Choppy regime flip would unwind the entire 33-position long book simultaneously with no statistical justification.
